ogTitle: Durran Durra vs Durras North: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Durran Durra and Durras North.
heading: Durran Durra vs Durras North — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Durran Durra, New South Wales and Durras North, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Durran Durra has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Durras North (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Durran Durra or Durras North safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Durran Durra has a flood risk score of 40/100, while Durras North scores 59/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Durran Durra scores 25/100 for bushfire risk. Durras North scores 37/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Durran Durra or Durras North?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Durran Durra has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.8% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
